openapi.name: get_weather
openapi.description: Retrieve weather information for a location

info.title: get weather data
info.description: Retrieves current weather data for a location based on wttr.in.

get.description: Get weather information for a specific location

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: City or location to retrieve the weather for

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Always use j1 value for this parameter

functions.name: get_weather_GetCurrentWeather
functions.description: Get weather information for a specific location

location.description: City or location to retrieve the weather for

text.value:
The current weather in Seattle is:

- **Temperature:** 13°C (56°F)
- **Condition:** Overcast  
- **Humidity:** 84%
- **Wind:** 8 mph (13 km/h) from the South  
- **Precipitation:** 0.3 mm
- **Feels Like:** 12°C (54°F)

You can expect quite a bit of cloud cover with a chance of light drizzle or rain throughout the evening. Typical Seattle weather!  
[![Overcast sky icon](https://cdn.worldweatheronline.com/images/wsymbols01_png_64/wsymbol_0004_black_low_cloud.png)](https://cdn.worldweatheronline.com/images/wsymbols01_png_64/wsymbol_0004_black_low_cloud.png)

Let me know if you want the detailed forecast or hourly breakdown.
What is the weather in Seattle?
